sentences.english: Do you think competitive sports are good for children?
Give reasons to support your opinion.
I believe competitive sports offer valuable benefits for children when managed properly.
sentences.korean: 적절히 관리되면 경쟁 스포츠가 아이들에게 가치 있는 혜택을 제공한다고 생각해요.

sentences.english: First they teach children how to handle both winning and losing gracefully.
sentences.korean: 첫째 이기는 것과 지는 것을 품위 있게 다루는 법을 가르쳐줘요.

sentences.english: Learning to lose with dignity is a life skill that will serve them well as adults.
sentences.korean: 품위 있게 지는 법을 배우는 것은 어른이 되어서도 도움이 될 생활 기술이에요.

sentences.english: Second team sports build cooperation and communication skills that are essential in the workplace.
sentences.korean: 둘째 팀 스포츠는 직장에서 필수적인 협동심과 의사소통 기술을 길러줘요.

sentences.english: However parents and coaches must ensure that the focus remains on personal growth and fun rather than winning at all costs.
sentences.korean: 하지만 부모와 코치는 승리보다 개인 성장과 재미에 초점이 맞춰지도록 해야 해요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
